_doc: Cross-platform golden samples for the DNS A-record response parser (audit C7 / D3c-04). Kotlin (ConfigFetcher.kt parseFirstARecord) and Swift (core/DnsParse.swift parseFirstARecord) walk the same raw DNS response bytes and must extract the same first A-record IPv4. No JS implementation (JS resolves via expo/fetch). Fixtures are happy-path responses (rcode=0, txID matches, >=1 answer); each runner supplies the header-derived args its signature needs (Swift: ancount from bytes 6-7; Kotlin: txID). responseHex is the full UDP DNS response.

cases.name: CNAME answer skipped, A record returned
